challenges.title: Fluid Heading System
challenges.description: Create a heading system (h1-h6) that scales fluidly using clamp().
challenges.instructions: Define CSS that makes all 6 heading levels fluid. h1 should be largest, h6 smallest.
hints: Use a modular scale ratio of 1.25
Each heading should use clamp() with different vw values
Set line-height tighter for larger headings

challenges.title: Article Page with Perfect Vertical Rhythm
challenges.description: Create a blog article page with consistent vertical rhythm using a modular scale.
challenges.instructions: Build an article with headings, paragraphs, blockquotes, lists, and images. All spacing should follow a vertical rhythm based on the base line-height.
hints: Calculate a base rhythm unit (e.g., 1.5rem for 16px base with 1.5 line-height)
Use multiples of the rhythm unit for all margins and padding

challenges.title: Dynamic Type Tester
challenges.description: Build an interactive tool that lets users adjust font-size, line-height, measure, and letter-spacing with real-time preview.
challenges.instructions: Create a UI with sliders/controls for typography properties. Show sample text that updates in real-time.
hints: Use CSS custom properties set via JavaScript
Include presets for different type scales
Show the current CSS code that would generate the preview
challenges.solution: JavaScript would set CSS custom properties: document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--font-size', value + 'px'). CSS uses these variables: body { font-size: var(--font-size); line-height: var(--line-height); }
